title: Seahorse Apartments – own a slice of luxury in Knysna
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Tucked away in the heart of...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Tucked away in the heart of Knysna, just moments from the lagoon and the ever-popular Waterfront, Seahorse Apartments presents a rare opportunity to own a slice of luxury in one of South Africa’s most beloved coastal towns. With only 11 units remaining, this is your final call to invest in a high-demand property that offers both lifestyle and long-term return on investment.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Tucked away in the heart of Knysna, just moments from the lagoon and the ever-popular Waterfront, Seahorse Apartments presents a rare opportunity to own a slice of luxury in one of South Africa’s most beloved coastal towns. With only 11 units remaining, this is your final call to invest in a high-demand property that offers both lifestyle and long-term return on investment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Modern coastal living at its bestEach one and two-bedroom apartment is thoughtfully designed with stylish finishes, open-plan living spaces, and private terraces complete with built-in braais; perfect for soaking up the Garden Route’s sunshine. Sizes range from 40m² to 57m², and all units come with secure parking, lift access, and inverters for energy efficiency.","html":"Modern coastal living at its best
Each one and two-bedroom apartment is thoughtfully designed with stylish finishes, open-plan living spaces, and private terraces complete with built-in braais; perfect for soaking up the Garden Route’s sunshine. Sizes range from 40m² to 57m², and all units come with secure parking, lift access, and inverters for energy efficiency."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rooftop pool, pet-friendly, turnkey investmentEnjoy exclusive access to a heated rooftop pool and sun deck, a serene internal courtyard, and seamless digital connectivity with integrated Bunny Digital Wi-Fi. Even better? Seahorse is pet-friendly, offering a true home for the whole family.","html":"Rooftop pool, pet-friendly, turnkey investment
Enjoy exclusive access to a heated rooftop pool and sun deck, a serene internal courtyard, and seamless digital connectivity with integrated Bunny Digital Wi-Fi. Even better? Seahorse is pet-friendly, offering a true home for the whole family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prime location with excellent rental potentialSituated within walking distance of Thesen Island and Knysna Waterfront’s world-class restaurants and boutiques, Seahorse Apartments are perfectly positioned for holiday rentals and Airbnb. Through Perch Short Stays, owners can enjoy fully managed, hassle-free short-term letting services; from listing to linen.","html":"Prime location with excellent rental potential
Situated within walking distance of Thesen Island and Knysna Waterfront’s world-class restaurants and boutiques, Seahorse Apartments are perfectly positioned for holiday rentals and Airbnb. Through Perch Short Stays, owners can enjoy fully managed, hassle-free short-term letting services; from listing to linen."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gallery: Own a slice of luxury in Knysna"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No transfer duty plus projected 10% rental returns","html":"No transfer duty plus projected 10% rental returns"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Buying directly from the developer means no transfer duty. With a professional management team and Knysna’s booming tourism industry, conservative estimates show returns of up to 10%, making Seahorse as smart an investment as it is a sanctuary.","html":"Buying directly from the developer means no transfer duty. With a professional management team and Knysna’s booming tourism industry, conservative estimates show returns of up to 10%, making Seahorse as smart an investment as it is a sanctuary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Construction nearing completion – Move in by Spring 2025!Act now - with just 11 units still available, demand is high and time is running out.","html":"Construction nearing completion – Move in by Spring 2025!
Act now - with just 11 units still available, demand is high and time is running out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact our sales team today:","html":"Contact our sales team today:"},{"type":"list","items":["Gail Rimbault: +27 83 700 0881","Tina Brown: +27 83 284 0606 www.seahorse-apartments.com"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
